meaning: <法>adj.[用作后置形容词]异常的,特别的,非凡的
examples: If you haven't noticed, the backstreet boy educated at Blackpool grammar styles himself more grandly as Alastair Cooke, broadcaster extraordinaire.
What they're attempting is a high-wire act extraordinaire.
The Brownie Extraordinaire is sold in Atlantic City, New Jersey.
The story began with a tweet yesterday evening from Jeri Ellsworth, hardware designer extraordinaire.
This last point led me to rethink my experience with Ron, the computer salesperson extraordinaire.
